# CWE-916 positive: MD5 password hashing (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-916-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-916: Use of Password Hash With Insufficient Computational Effort.
// Vulnerable: registration handler stores md5 digest of the posted password.

import (
	"crypto/md5"
	"encoding/hex"
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var accountsMu sync.Mutex
var accounts = map[string]string{}

func RegisterWeakHashPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if err := r.ParseForm(); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		username := r.FormValue("username")
		password := r.FormValue("password")
		sum := md5.Sum([]byte(password))
		hash := hex.EncodeToString(sum[:])
		accountsMu.Lock()
		accounts[username] = hash
		accountsMu.Unlock()
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
	}
}
